From: Carlos Armas – VP of Engineering at Treasury Prime – June 27, 2025 (Carlos worked with Brian on the same team)
Text: Brian has superb skills and principles, professionally and personally. The combination makes him a great team leader and a wonderful human being. This is not an exhaustive review, but a summary of why I admire Brian. Brian steps in when there is a problem that needs to be fixed. Whether the problem concerns his realm or not. He provides frequent and constructive feedback. Brian makes his team feel appreciated via direct interaction and public praising, in a way that is authentic and genuine. His secret is that he understands and appreciates every individual in the team, and cares about them. It is felt and folks respond in kind. Personally, the one thing I love about working with Brian is our 1:1 sessions, even when we are not required to do so by our job responsibilities. I learn a lot in the process. Team management is science and art, Brian is an alchemist who can blend both. Thank you Brian!… more
